channel.title: Delta V IntelHub — All Signals
channel.description: Curated intelligence feed from Delta V

item.title: EDX Markets Closes $76M Series C Led by SBI Holdings
item.description: EDX Markets, an institutional-only crypto trading venue with its own central clearinghouse, closed a $76 million Series C funding round led by SBI Holdings, the firm said in a press release. The Tokyo-listed financial group becomes a strategic investor in the U.S. exchange. The capital will fund…

item.title: A mysterious whale is making a big long bet on $MU. Someone created a new wallet (0xC8b5) 3 hours ago, deposited 14.64M $USDC into Hyperliquid, and opened a 3x long on 31,485 $MU ($28.84M). https://hy

item.description: pIn case you missed it.br /br /China just completed the world's first implantation of a commercially approved invasive brain-computer interface (BCI).br /br /NEO, approved by China's NMPA in March 2026, is the world's first commercially approved invasive brain implant 👀br /br /This coin-sized device

item.title: BAHRAIN’S AIR DEFENSES INTERCEPTED AND DESTROYED SEVERAL IRANIAN AERIAL ATTACKS ON TUESDAY, THE BAHRAIN DEFENSE FORCE SAID. THE MILITARY ACCUSED IRAN OF ENDANGERING CIVILIANS THROUGH ATTACKS INVOLVING
item.description: pBAHRAIN’S AIR DEFENSES INTERCEPTED AND DESTROYED SEVERAL IRANIAN AERIAL ATTACKS ON TUESDAY, THE BAHRAIN DEFENSE FORCE SAID. THE MILITARY ACCUSED IRAN OF ENDANGERING CIVILIANS THROUGH ATTACKS INVOLVING MISSILES AND DRONES AND URGED THE PUBLIC NOT TO APPROACH DEBRIS OR UNIDENTIFIED OBJECTS. .../p

item.title: IRAN CLAIMS STRIKES ON AMAZON DATA CENTER, U.S. BASE IRAN’S REVOLUTIONARY GUARD CLAIMED IT STRUCK AMAZON DATA CENTER INFRASTRUCTURE IN BAHRAIN IN RETALIATION FOR A U.S. ATTACK ON THE DARKHOVIN NUCLEAR

item.title: AI ate software. Now it's eating math! I think the day is very close when progress will become so massive that it'll be harder to track. Every breakthrough will open the door to countless more. Innova

item.title: Paxos caught its own $300 trillion mint in about 20 minutes. That's the encouraging part. The less encouraging part is that the outcome depended on someone noticing, not on a control that made the err
item.description: pPaxos caught its own $300 trillion mint in about 20 minutes. That's the encouraging part. The less encouraging part is that the outcome depended on someone noticing, not on a control that made the error impossible to execute in the first place.br /br /An internal operation meant to mint $300 millio

item.description: pBlockSec: Wanchain Cardano Bridge Reportedly Exploited, 515M NIGHT Drained br /br /BlockSec's Phalcon said Wanchain's Cardano bridge was reportedly exploited, with approximately 515 million NIGHT drained from the bridge treasury. item.title: This Week in Digital Finance (07.17.2026)
item.description: A win for open weight models as memory sells off, Kalshi enters the compute derivatives race, and Stripe tries to buy PayPal.

item.description: pBase Head: Working With Coinbase on 1:1 Asset-Backed Tokenized Stocksbr /br /Base head Jesse Pollak said in a post on X that Robinhood Chain’s launch of tokenized stocks in an EVM environment is the right direction. item.description: pStrategy Says Bitcoin Reserve Could Cover 31 Years of Dividendsbr /br /Strategy Corporate Treasurer Chaitanya Jain said the company’s Bitcoin reserve could cover approximately 31 years of dividends, while its U.S. dollar reserve could cover around 1.8 years. Strategy founder Michael Saylor said tha

item.title: PALO ALTO, California -- Hidden debt at U.S. tech giants swelled eightfold in roughly four years to an estimated $1.65 trillion as artificial intelligence investments ballooned, a Nikkei study shows,
item.description: pPALO ALTO, California -- Hidden debt at U.S. tech giants swelled eightfold in roughly four years to an estimated $1.65 trillion as artificial intelligence investments ballooned, a Nikkei study shows, exceeding actual debt and making it tougher for investors to assess risk.br /Nikkei examined recent

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs Record $227M in Net Inflows on July 20 On July 20 (ET), U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded total net inflows of $227 million, marking the fifth consecutive day of net inflows. U.S. spot
item.description: pSpot Bitcoin ETFs Record $227M in Net Inflows on July 20br /br /On July 20 (ET), U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded total net inflows of $227 million, marking the fifth consecutive day of net inflows. U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs saw total net inflows of $38.09 million./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/med

item.title: ENS DAO Approves Two-Year Security Council to Veto Malicious Transactions ENS DAO has approved a new eight-member Security Council with a two-year term and a 5-of-8 multisig. The council may cancel tr
item.description: pENS DAO Approves Two-Year Security Council to Veto Malicious Transactionsbr /br /ENS DAO has approved a new eight-member Security Council with a two-year term and a 5-of-8 multisig. The council may cancel transactions deemed malicious during the two-day timelock after a governance proposal passes,
